message: Running command: if command -v tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then tree -L 2 --dirsfirst -s -I '__pycache__|node_modules|.git|.venv|venv' . | head -200; else find . -maxdepth 2 \( -name '__pycache__' -o -name 'node_modules' -o -name '.git' -o -name '.venv' -o -name 'venv' \) -prune -o -type f -printf '%s %p\n' | sort -k2 | head -200; fi

args.command: if command -v tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then tree -L 2 --dirsfirst -s -I '__pycache__|node_modules|.git|.venv|venv' . | head -200; else find . -maxdepth 2 \( -name '__pycache__' -o -name 'node_modules' -o -name '.git' -o -name '.venv' -o -name 'venv' \) -prune -o -type f -printf '%s %p\n' | sort -k2 | head -200; fi
